zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Weston MP於大約1465年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特布陽斯頓時，他的父親Thomas Edmund Weston30歲，母親Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford26歲。他於1484年與Jane Cannon在英國多瑟特布陽斯頓結婚。他於1508年在根西島被列為keeper of castle cornet。他去世於1541年8月7日在英國素瑞塞頓享年77歲，埋葬在英國素瑞吉爾德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Weston MP于大约1465年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特布陽斯頓时，他的父亲Thomas Edmund Weston30岁，母亲Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford26岁。他于1484年与Jane Cannon在英国多瑟特布陽斯頓结婚。他于1508年在根西岛被列为keeper of castle cornet。他去世于1541年8月7日在英国素瑞塞頓享年77岁，埋葬在英国素瑞吉爾德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Weston MP was born about 1465, in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Edmund Weston, was 30 and his mother, Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford, was 26. He married Jane Cannon in 1484, in Bryanston, Dorset, England. In 1508, his occupation is listed as keeper of castle cornet in Guernsey. He died on 7 August 1541, in Sutton, Surrey, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Guildford, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Weston MP est né environ 1465, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Edmund Weston, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Jane Cannon en 1484, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre. En 1508, sa profession de son indiquée est keeper of castle cornet à Guernesey. Il est décédé le 7 août 1541, à Sutton, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Guildford, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Weston MP um 1465 in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Edmund Weston 30 und seine Mutter Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford 26. Er hat 1484 in Bryanston, Dorset, England Jane Cannon geheiratet. 1508 ist sein Beruf als keeper of castle cornet in Guernsey aufgeführt. Er starb am 7. August 1541 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Sutton, Surrey, England und wurde in Guildford, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Weston MP è nato il circa 1465 nel Bryanston, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Edmund Weston, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Jane Cannon nel 1484, nel Bryanston, Dorset, England. Nel 1508, la sua occupazione è indicata come keeper of castle cornet nel Guernsey. Morì il 7 agosto 1541, nel Sutton, Surrey, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Guildford, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Weston MPが約1465年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブリアンストンで生まれた時，父Thomas Edmund Westonは30歳，母Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddlefordは26歳であった。1484年にイギリスドールセトブリアンストンでJane Cannonと結婚した。1508年，ガーンジーでの職業はkeeper of castle cornetと記録されている。彼は1541年8月7日にイギリススリースットオンで77歳で死去し，イギリススリーグイルドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Weston MP(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Edmund Weston(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1484년 영국 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 Jane Cannon(와)과 결혼했다. 1508년, 그의 직업은 건지에서 keeper of castle cornet이었다. 그는 1541년 8월 7일 영국 수리 수턴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 길드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Weston MP nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Edmund Weston, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Cannon em 1484, em Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra. Em 1508, sua profissão aparece como keeper of castle cornet em Guernsey. Ele faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1541, em Sutton, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Guildford, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Weston MP родился около 1465 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Edmund Weston было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Cannon в 1484 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия. В 1508 году он работал по профессии keeper of castle cornet в местности Гернси. Он умер 7 августа 1541 г. в местности суттон, сурри, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности гуаилдфорд, сурри, Англия.

sm.from 1509 to 1541: mai le 1509 e o'o I le 1541

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Weston MP nació aproximadamente 1465, en Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Edmund Weston, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Jane Cannon en 1484, en Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra. En 1508, su ocupación registrada era keeper of castle cornet en Guernsey. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1541, en Sutton, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Guildford, Surrey, Inglaterra.
